zh.Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾
zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.Wotton-under-Edge, Gloucestershire, Engl: 英國格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle於1333年4月4日出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，他的父親Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle29歲，母親Eleanor FitzAlan26歲。他於大約1359年與Margaret Pipard在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年6月28日享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle于1333年4月4日出生在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾时，他的父亲Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle29岁，母亲Eleanor FitzAlan26岁。他于大约1359年与Margaret Pipard在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年6月28日享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Warine
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle was born on 4 April 1333, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, his father, Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle, was 29 and his mother, Eleanor FitzAlan, was 26. He married Margaret Pipard about 1359, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 28 June 1382, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle est né le 4 avril 1333, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzAlan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Pipard environ 1359, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1382, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle am 4. April 1333 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle 29 und seine Mutter Eleanor FitzAlan 26. Er hat um 1359 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England Margaret Pipard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Juni 1382 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle è nato il il 4 aprile 1333 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor FitzAlan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Pipard circa 1359, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 giugno 1382, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisleが1333年4月4日にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisleは29歳，母Eleanor FitzAlanは26歳であった。約1359年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルでMargaret Pipardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年6月28日に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle(이)가 1333년 4월 4일 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor FitzAlan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 Margaret Pipard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 6월 28일 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.4 April 1333–28 June 1382: 1333 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 4–1382 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 28
mn.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, Unit: Berkeley, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.4 April 1333–28 June 1382: 4 de abril de 1333–28 de junho de 1382
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle nasceu em 4 de abril de 1333, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor FitzAlan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Pipard aproximadamente 1359, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1382, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle родился 4 апреля 1333 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor FitzAlan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Pipard около 1359 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 июня 1382 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.4 April 1333–28 June 1382: 4 de abril de 1333–28 de junio de 1382
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle nació el 4 de abril de 1333, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gerard de L'Isle II 1st Baron Lisle, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor FitzAlan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Pipard aproximadamente 1359, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de junio de 1382, a la edad de 49 años.
